_meta.description: Master asset manifest for the Eryndor world. Add new assets here once — never rebuild. construction_mode() auto-filters to current scene assets.
_meta.token_budget_note: Full manifest never sent to Claude. Compressed one-line summary auto-generated per session from active scene assets only.

SM_Broken_House.description: Large broken-down house, heavy structural damage, missing sections of wall and roof
SM_Broken_House.notes: Use for main building masses on left/right alley walls. Mirror to vary silhouette.

SM_Building_Ruins.description: Large ruined building structure, partial walls and floors remaining, open to sky
SM_Building_Ruins.notes: Larger footprint than SM_Ruined_house. Use as anchor building for scene.

SM_copper_pipe.description: Straight copper/bronze steam pipe segment, industrial steampunk aesthetic
SM_copper_pipe.notes: Primary pipe segment. Stack vertically with array. Combine with T and curve variants for runs along building facades. Default orientation is vertical — rotate 90 on X for horizontal runs.

SM_cornertower.description: Tall stone corner tower, medieval/gothic, tapers slightly toward top
SM_cornertower.notes: Use for background depth — place far on Z axis. Also works as scene anchor at alley end. Tallest vertical element in library.

SM_curve_copper_pipe.description: 90-degree curved copper pipe elbow joint, matches SM_copper_pipe diameter
SM_curve_copper_pipe.notes: Use to change pipe direction — horizontal to vertical runs. Place at pipe direction changes. Rotate to match pipe orientation.

SM_Eryndor_Flag.description: Tattered hanging flag/banner, dark fabric with Eryndor markings, ragged edges
SM_Eryndor_Flag.notes: Pivot is at top — attach point is top_center. Hang from walls or overhead structures. Array along X for multiple flags across alley.

SM_Lamp_Post.description: Iron street lamp post, ornate bracket, steampunk/gothic style, single lantern head
SM_Lamp_Post.notes: Place along building facades. Mirror for left/right variants. Scale reference: 3.5m tall = roughly 1.67x a standard door height.

SM_Merchant_Cart.description: Wooden merchant/market cart with wheels, weathered, used for selling wares
SM_Merchant_Cart.notes: Ground-placed mid/foreground prop. Good for scene storytelling — implies a market or abandoned commerce. Angle slightly off-axis for natural feel.

SM_Ruined_house.description: Ruined timber-frame house, 2-3 stories, heavy decay and damage, partial roof
SM_Ruined_house.notes: Primary alley building block. Use on left and right walls. Slightly smaller footprint than SM_Building_Ruins. Can be placed flush against scene edge.

SM_Small_wooden_house.description: Small wooden house, simpler construction, less damage than ruined variants, intact or lightly weathered
SM_Small_wooden_house.notes: Smaller building — use to vary building scale and break up repetition. Works as ground-floor shop frontage alongside larger ruined buildings.

SM_T_copper_pipe.description: T-junction copper pipe fitting — splits one pipe run into two directions
SM_T_copper_pipe.notes: Use where pipe runs branch. Place at junction points between SM_copper_pipe segments. Rotate to orient the branch direction correctly.
